title: Add fit_predict and labels() accessor to all clustering estimators
description:
sklearn ClusterMixin.fit_predict(X) is the standard convenience: fit on X then return the cluster labels for those same training samples. Plus a labels_ attribute exposing the per-sample cluster index after fit.

Affected: every fitted clustering estimator. Approach varies:
- For estimators that already store labels in the fitted struct (DBSCAN, OPTICS, AgglomerativeClustering, HDBSCAN, Birch, AffinityPropagation, SpectralClustering): add labels() accessor returning &Array1<isize> (or Array1<usize> where applicable), and fit_predict on the unfit struct that returns those labels directly.
- For predict-capable estimators (KMeans, MiniBatchKMeans, BisectingKMeans, MeanShift, GMM, BayesianGMM): add fit_predict that just calls fit then predict on training X.
